payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the current, non-superseded memory. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so returning it as current would risk surfacing stale information.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall path retained the non-superseded memory and filtered the older superseded memory to avoid presenting stale information as current.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected as the active/current memory about Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall results because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Explained that mem_new was returned because it is current.
Explained that mem_old was filtered because it is superseded.
Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession metadata.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If both memories should remain visible, mark mem_old as historical rather than current.
